title: Dendrophorbium sotarense
taxonomy: Dendrophorbium sotarense is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is classified under the genus Dendrophorbium, which is a group of plants native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The family Asteraceae, to which it belongs, is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as the sunflower or daisy family. Dendrophorbium sotarense is further classified into various ranks, including kingdom, class, order, and subfamily, which provide a more detailed understanding of its relationships to other plants. By examining its classification, researchers can gain insights into the plant's evolutionary history and its place within the broader plant kingdom.
